title: Storyboard · "Knock" — Radio→Animation production script · S2
body:
**Scene 2: 00:45–02:00 · The Empty Street**

HERO FRAME: Wide street-level shot of an empty American city at twilight, 1950 · streetlamps on but no people · a single newspaper blowing past · a parked car with the driver's door hanging open · steam rising from a manhole

MOTION: kling — newspaper drifts across the foreground, steam curls, a single streetlamp flickers, one curtain in an upper window stirs. **No people, no movement, no life — only the ghost of life.**

MOOD: Hopper / *Nighthawks* loneliness.

AUDIO: Narrator (Walter, voice-over, soft and tired): *"This is the city I live in now. I am the only one in it."*

source.label: Dimension X episode #05 (NBC Radio, May 6, 1950) adapting Fredric Brown's 1948 short-short story "Knock" (originally in *Thrilling Wonder Stories*, December 1948)

author: matt

witnesses.label: Rufinus of Aquileia, Commentary on the Apostles' Creed (c. AD 404)
Pirminius, De singulis libris canonicis scarapsus (c. AD 750) — earliest received form
Cited by every major catechism since 8th century
